examples: In Fenchurch Street a fair child, in costly apparel, stood on a stage to welcome his Majesty to the city.
The store sells women's and children's apparel.
Women's apparel is offered in petite, regular, and tall sizes.
He co-founded a record label, sold an apparel line and owns the 4040 nightclub franchise.
The Jessica Simpson Collection extends into 22 product categories including shoes, apparel, accessories and fragrances.
